name: Modern |💍| ⟪Shahra The Genie of the Ring⟫ |💍| SONIC AND THE SECRET RINGS AU
description:
{UPDATE 1-MINI: Added Misgiving Song from the Soundtrack}
"Greetings....I am Shahra....The Genie of the Ring....What is thy wish?"

An Au where the world of the Arabian Nights were blend into the Modern real world under different circumstances, this takes place AFTER Erazor djinn's Sealing into the lamp.

Well this was Bound to happen eventually. I AM SECRETRINGBOY AFTER ALLLLL~

Art by KeenKanji
creator: SonicSecretRingBoy
